subject: docs(claude-md): update documentation for custom tone tags
body:
Remove references to tone_usage table, global_tone_popularity view,
increment_tone_usage function, message_replies table, and tone
categories. Update project structure, RLS policies, technical guidelines,
and tone tag descriptions to reflect the new custom tone system.
